children.text:
630 Park Court Drive
Rohnert Park, CA  94928

The Bay Area’s Finest Poker Room.
Conveniently located next to the Parking Garage,Restroom,Market Place, and G Bar. Featuring a magnificent environment splendidly decorated with 20 state of the art poker tables,luxurious chairs, in a Non Smoking atmosphere. 
Home of Northern California's largest Jackpots 
Now charge your phone from your seat, with Sit N Charge

New Hours 
We're giving away up to $1300 per hour!!
With Hot Seat Drawing with Table Shares. 
Sundays 12PM-8PM   

Extended Hours 
$500 per hour High Hands 
Saturdays 12PM - 8PM   

High Hands  M-F 10 AM - 10 PM
$100 every hour

More Money
$100 Aces Cracked M-F 12 AM - 8 AM

 
Share the Wealth Jumbo Holdem Jackpot, where every qualifying guests WINS.

Jumbo Holdem Jackpot $114,642.00 

Lose with Quad Nines (6,6,6,6) or better and win.
Losing hand receives 40% of the total jackpot.
Winning Hand receives 25% of the total jackpot.
Table share of 5% of the total jackpot
Room share 30% split between every qualified guest in the room. 
Jumbo Jackpot rules apply. 

Omaha Bad Beat Jackpot $14,451.00

Lose with Quad Nines (6,6,6,6) or better and win. 
Losing hand receives 40% of the total jackpot.
Winning Hand receives 30% of the total jackpot.
A table share of 30% split between the remaining qualified players.  

Big O Bad Beat Jackpot $3807.00

Lose with Quad Tens (10,10,10,10) or better and win. 
Losing hand receives 40% of the total jackpot.
Winning Hand receives 30% of the total jackpot.
A table share of 30% split between the remaining qualified players. 
Bad Beat Jackpots may not reflect current value.

Omaha Quad Floppers
$100 4 card Omaha
$50 5 Card Omaha
 
Royal Flush Bonus 
Make a Royal Flush using your 2 hole cards and win $250
 
Early Morning Special 
Monday - Friday 8:30AM - 9:30AM
Buy-in for $80 and receive $100 in chips (2 hours of play required) 

Mini Bad Beats 
Get beat with Aces Full or better by Quads and you WIN!
Losing hand $1000 
Winning hand $500
Qualifying table shares $150 each 
Jumbo Jackpot rules apply. 

  
SEE POKER ROOM FOR DETAILS !!!

NEW beginning March 2

$10 Staff Add-on = T 2500
Alternates through level 3

$10 add-on  = T 2500
Alternates and Re-Entries through level 3
Sign ups Are Open
